query: 我在codex里怎么验证你做的好？

现在用户端有明显好用了么？
截至 `2026-04-18`，如果标准是“用户现在能稳定明显感觉更好用了”，我的判断是：`还不能稳妥地这么说`。 更准确地说是两层：
怎么解决，如果这个问题不解决，其他的都不要做
能解，而且方向很明确。关键是别再把它当成“继续做更多功能”，而是把它当成一个单独的 `UX bug` 来收。 我已经先把控制面改了：`.codex/status.md`、`.codex/plan.md` 和几个 host view 现在都回到“只解决用户体感不明显，`Stage 12` 暂停”。
继续做了，且这轮只动了“用户体感”主线。 我已经落了两类实改：
继续做完了两块核心实现，都是围着“用户体感”来的。 这轮代码改动： - `src/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js`：默认 recent-message 窗口缩到 `12`，assistant/context 压缩更狠，减少把长历史继续带进当前轮。 - `src/dialogue-working-set-shadow.js` 和…
我在codex里怎么验证你做的好？

decision.archive_summary: Earlier Stage 11 control-plane closure and document sync were completed: status/plan/host views were brought back to Stage 12 current slice and aligned to one narrative. That solved bookkeeping/setup context, but it is no longer the active dependency for the next turn.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn asks how to validate whether the assistant's recent UX-focused work in Codex actually improved things. That is the same active topic as t3-t10: whether the user-facing experience is noticeably better, how to treat it as the top-priority UX bug, and what concrete changes were made. Those turns should remain raw because the validation answer depends on the unresolved main task and the specific fixes already claimed. t1-t2 are an older resolved setup block about Stage 11 control-plane/doc synchronization, which is off the critical path for answering the validation question and can leave the next-turn prompt.
